title: Google Just Revealed What Comes After AGI And It’s Shocking
summary: Google DeepMind published a paper titled "From AGI to ASI" arguing that AGI may not be an endpoint but the beginning of a competitive race toward artificial superintelligence. The paper suggests that once human-level AI is achieved, copying, accelerating, and networking such systems for further AI development could enable rapid progression to superintelligence, making ASI advancement potentially more consequential than AGI itself.
writeup: The video covers a Google DeepMind paper titled "From AGI to ASI," which argues that human-level AI may mark a starting point rather than an endpoint. The central claim: once AGI exists, copying, accelerating, and networking those systems to do further AI development could drive rapid progression toward artificial superintelligence. The takeaway is that the transition to ASI may prove more consequential than reaching AGI, framing the next phase as a competitive race.
